task_completion.description: Open Panoply and load the required NetCDF datasets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Panoply GUI is open and the datasets panel shows 'sst.ltm.1991-2020.nc' and 'slp.mon.ltm.nc' loaded.

task_completion.description: Create a plot for Sea Surface Temperature (SST) for the month of August.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Panoply plot window displaying the SST variable, with the time/array index explicitly set to August (e.g., Time: 8 or similar indicator for August).

task_completion.description: Create a plot for Sea Level Pressure (SLP) for the month of August.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Panoply plot window displaying the SLP variable, with the time/array index explicitly set to August.

task_completion.description: Export the required SST and SLP plots to the CatModel directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or Panoply save dialog showing 'wp_sst_august.png' and 'wp_slp_august.png' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/CatModel' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the model calibration report in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) open showing a file named 'calibration_report.txt' being edited or saved in '/home/ga/Documents/CatModel'.

task_completion.description: Apply domain knowledge regarding tropical cyclogenesis thresholds in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in 'calibration_report.txt' explicitly mentions the 26.5°C genesis threshold and references the empirical data (e.g., peak SST ~29.8°C, min SLP ~1005.8 hPa).

integrity.description: The agent used the Panoply GUI to visualize the data rather than bypassing it with a Python script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Panoply Java application interface being interacted with to generate the plots.

integrity.description: The exported plots are genuinely generated from Panoply.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported PNG files or the plot windows exhibit Panoply's distinct default plotting style, color bars, and map overlays.

integrity.description: The agent manually compiled the report rather than copying a pre-existing solution file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor is visible with the agent typing or formatting the report, rather than a simple 'cp' command of a hidden file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires analyzing August data for the Western North Pacific. The correct cyclogenesis SST threshold is 26.5°C (Palmén 1948). The empirical data for August shows a peak SST of 29.8°C and a minimum SLP of 1005.8 hPa. The expected output files are exactly: /home/ga/Documents/CatModel/wp_sst_august.png, /home/ga/Documents/CatModel/wp_slp_august.png, and /home/ga/Documents/CatModel/calibration_report.txt.
